sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25441" key="diapagkratia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαπαγκρᾰτιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n25441.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contend in the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παγκράτιον,</foreign> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.811d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
